paper.title: ABot-AgentOS: A General Robotic Agent OS with Lifelong Multi-modal Memory

project_page.note: Linked from arXiv abstract; returns GitHub Pages 404.

github.note: Repo exists but contains only a 10-line README.md and a reference to a missing architecture image. No source code, benchmark, or model weights.

benchmark.name: EmbodiedWorldBench
benchmark.note: Paper states 'future work will report the complete benchmark evaluation and release EmbodiedWorldBench for open research use.' Built on UnrealZoo with 16 scenes and >300 annotated waypoints.

training_pipeline.note: Deployment-oriented small-model training pipeline (text sandbox, teacher distillation, SFT, RL with LLM-as-a-Judge) described but not released.

related_abot_repos.note: AMAP CV Lab has released ABot-Navigation, ABot-Manipulation, ABot-PhysWorld, and ABot-Explorer with code, but none implement AgentOS or EmbodiedWorldBench.

probe.description: Runnable reconstruction of the typed multi-modal graph memory, hybrid retriever, and evidence-subgraph expansion.
